ddls:
CREATE TABLE "correspondence" (
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correspondence */,
  "correspondence_date" TEXT /* Date of the correspondence */,
  "letter" TEXT /* Content of the correspondence letter */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the correspondence */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Current status of the correspondence (e.g., Completed, With Editor) */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the correspondence */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator handling the correspondence */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manuscript associated with the correspondence */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of correspondence */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the correspondence */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the correspondence to be completed */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the correspondence */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the correspondence is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES correspondence_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the recipient */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the correspondence status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., Editor, Assistant) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the operator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "letters" (
  "letter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each letter */,
  "letter_content" TEXT /* Full text content of the letter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the letter was created */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the letter */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* Path to any attached files */,
  "is_template" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the letter is a template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("letter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding correspondence */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the revision */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding correspondence */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the correspondence assigned */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator assigned to the correspondence */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was made */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the assignment is completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the assignment was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_assignments_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_assignments_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the correspondence type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the type is the default type for new correspondences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding correspondence */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Created, Updated, Closed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the action */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_system_action" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the action is performed by the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)
